# OAmetrics

An R package for computing several bibliometric indices by calling the
OpenAlex database API.

You can install the developer version of `OAmetrics` from GitHub with:

    install.packages("remotes")
    remotes::install_github("nicebread/OAmetrics")

## Documentation

Go to the [package’s website](https://nicebread.github.io/OAmetrics/).

## Known issues / TODOs

- FNCS: If a paper is assigned to multiple fields, this should be an
  weighted average. Currently, the function implicitly assumes that you
  only look at a single field.
- get_reference_set: around 20% of sampled document are duplicates.
  Ensure that only unique documents are sampled (use paging?)
- 

# Package index

## All functions

- [`FNCS()`](https://nicebread.github.io/OAmetrics/reference/FNCS.md) :
  Compute the Field Normalized Citation Score (FNCS) and Percentage Rank
  (FNPR) of a publication
- [`ecdf2()`](https://nicebread.github.io/OAmetrics/reference/ecdf2.md)
  : ecdf2
- [`evenness_index()`](https://nicebread.github.io/OAmetrics/reference/evenness_index.md)
  : Evenness Index function
- [`get_BIP()`](https://nicebread.github.io/OAmetrics/reference/get_BIP.md)
  : Retrieve BIP scores for a list of DOIs
- [`get_JIF()`](https://nicebread.github.io/OAmetrics/reference/get_JIF.md)
  : Compute the Journal Impact Factor
- [`get_n_authors()`](https://nicebread.github.io/OAmetrics/reference/get_n_authors.md)
  : Get Number of Authors from an OpenAlex Object
- [`get_network()`](https://nicebread.github.io/OAmetrics/reference/get_network.md)
  : Get network analysis of co-authorships for a given author or set of
  works
- [`get_reference_set()`](https://nicebread.github.io/OAmetrics/reference/get_reference_set.md)
  : Get a reference set for field- and age-normalized citation rates
- [`get_reference_set_from_files()`](https://nicebread.github.io/OAmetrics/reference/get_reference_set_from_files.md)
  : Helper function: Get reference set from files
- [`h_index()`](https://nicebread.github.io/OAmetrics/reference/h_index.md)
  : Compute h-index and hIa-index
- [`normalize_ORCIDs()`](https://nicebread.github.io/OAmetrics/reference/normalize_ORCIDs.md)
  : Normalize ORCIDs
- [`normalize_dois()`](https://nicebread.github.io/OAmetrics/reference/normalize_dois.md)
  : Normalize DOIs
- [`upper_trim_mean()`](https://nicebread.github.io/OAmetrics/reference/upper_trim_mean.md)
  : Calculates the upper trimmed mean of a vector
